title: Herobrine Is Back
description: Add HEROBRINE to Minecraft. And 1 potion.
body:
## Herobrine Is Back

### Overview

The grand herobrine is back. He has 1000 hearts.

1 structure: Herobrine Dungeon.

1 block: Herobrine Cage

### Feautures

When is herobrine cage active spawn herobrine.

Herobrine eye is ingredient to Herobrine effect.

Herobrine cage can be found in Herobrine dungeon.

You can get herobrine eye when you kill the herobrine.

### Showcase

![battle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f71ab40b3cd6fb980eb6e6d78a32e39ee8cffe1.png)

Battle is very hard. It's for advanced players.

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c006d0da7d6df927785797af903347ea3622b6a_0.webp)

This is the inventory.
